experience.title: Healthcare Analytics Manager
responsibilities: Led a team of 5 analysts in delivering insights that improved operational efficiencies, resulting in a 15% reduction in costs.
Developed and maintained dashboards in Tableau to visualize patient care metrics and operational performance.
Collaborated with clinical teams to assess data quality and implement governance practices in compliance with HIPAA regulations.
Facilitated workshops for non-technical stakeholders to present complex data findings in an understandable manner.

experience.title: Data Analyst
responsibilities: Performed data analysis using SQL to support healthcare initiatives, focusing on patient outcomes and resource allocation.
Assisted in the integration of EHR systems to enhance data accessibility and reporting capabilities.
Conducted statistical analysis to identify trends and inform operational strategies.

response.summary: Experienced healthcare analytics professional with a strong background in data governance and operational efficiency. Passionate about translating complex data into actionable insights that improve patient outcomes.
